column1: October 2025 showed significant momentum in microtransit expansion
column3: and technology integration across transit sectors. Key trends include app-based scheduling systems
column4: increasing government funding for clean transportation
column5: and industry consolidation. The government shutdown created uncertainty for federal contractors while local/state initiatives accelerated.

For transit technology companies serving this market:
• Focus on mobile-first solutions - App-based booking is table stakes
• Emphasize data security - Especially for NEMT/healthcare transportation
• Build integration capabilities - Multi-modal and multi-provider integration is increasingly required
• Target microtransit expansion - Highest growth segment in October data
• Position for EV transition - Fleet management tools for electric vehicles
• Pursue partnership opportunities - Follow Autocab/zTrip model of technology+operations collaboration
